data.title: Ratton Pantry | Baking & Pantry Supplies, Buy Flour Online, Eastbourne
data.metaDescription: Ratton Pantry stocks a selection of premium kitchen, pantry and baking ingredients such as bread flour, '00' Pizza Flour and Italian tomatoes. We sell a range of premium brands including Caputo®, Matthews Cotswold and Marriage's. Eastbourne, East Sussex. Buy flour online with us, convenient shopping, fast delivery.
data.ogTitle: Ratton Pantry | Baking & Pantry Supplies, Buy Flour Online, Eastbourne
data.ogDescription: Ratton Pantry stocks a selection of premium kitchen, pantry and baking ingredients such as bread flour, '00' Pizza Flour and Italian tomatoes. We sell a range of premium brands including Caputo®, Matthews Cotswold and Marriage's. Eastbourne, East Sussex. Buy flour online with us, convenient shopping, fast delivery.

issues.impact: Google will cut off your title in search results. You're losing valuable click-through real estate.
issues.fix: Trim to under 60 characters. Front-load your most important keywords.

issues.impact: Google truncates long descriptions. Your call-to-action is probably getting cut off.
issues.fix: Trim to 150-160 characters. Put the most important info first.

issues.impact: Multiple H1s confuse search engines about your page's main topic.
issues.fix: Use only one H1 per page. Use H2-H6 for subheadings.

issues.impact: Your links look terrible when shared on Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook. Broken thumbnail = low click rates.
issues.fix: Add og:title, og:description, og:image, and og:url to every page

issues.impact: Slow load times = higher bounce rates. Mobile users are leaving before your page loads.
issues.fix: Compress images, minify CSS/JS, enable gzip compression. Target under 500KB.

summary: We analyzed www.rattonpantry.co.uk and found 5 issues affecting your search visibility and conversions. The biggest opportunities are fixing your meta tags, improving mobile optimization, and adding structured data for rich snippets. These changes could significantly increase your organic traffic within 30-60 days.
